flashcards.definition: Public participation in scientific research: monitoring species, measuring air quality, reporting pollution.
Computer-based tools for mapping, analyzing, and visualizing environmental data spatially.
Designing solutions for environmental problems: water treatment, waste management, pollution control.
Using satellites and sensors to monitor environmental changes: deforestation, ice melt, water quality, and land use.
Growing fields: conservation biology, sustainability consulting, renewable energy, policy analysis, urban planning, environmental law.
